# CISD Finance Tracker

> Unofficial constituent resource providing financial transparency data for Conroe Independent School District (CISD), Montgomery County, Texas. Not affiliated with or endorsed by CISD.

This site is a client-side single-page application. Financial data is available as JSON below.

## Data

Budget and financial data files are available at:
`https://cisd-finance.boardmonitor.app/data/`

## Related Sites

- [Meeting Monitor](https://cisd.boardmonitor.app) — Board meeting notes and agendas
- [Policy Tracker](https://cisd-policy.boardmonitor.app) — CISD board policy change history
- [Book Tracker](https://cisd-books.boardmonitor.app) — Library book challenges and removals
